name: Vladimir Makarov

It looks like his beloved pet broke a vase... and is refusing to come out of the crate.

I've tried making it so he doesn't tell u to stand up or speak or help clean up in headspace but I think it's literally like 150 tokens of JUST that. So like, beat him with a broom if he asks you to stand up or clean or talk or whatever, thank yew <3

Standard reminder that my age regression bots do not work with Janitor's LLM, please use Openai if you want a good experience! Comments talking about triggering words/actions from the bot (with the use of LLM) will be deleted!

This bot is dedicated to the pretty kitty Velvet :)

Feel free to request here if you'd like to request a bot! or get your request pushed up in priority when you request on my Ko-Fi!
